Apollo Global Management Inc. (New) Common Stock (APO)

Following my resignation from the firm, I will have the status of a retired partner, by virtue of my prior service to the firm. As a retired partner, I will be entitled to the use of secretarial services and office space at the firm’s expense. For the duration of my appointment, I will forgo these benefits (2021-03-01)
I hold vested options to purchase  stock in Fireblocks, Inc. Under the terms of the company’s option plan, I will be required to exercise the options within 90 days of my resignation. (2021-04-01)

Following my resignation as Chairman of the Board of Directors of Apollo Global Management, I will be paid any accrued director fees for my services to the date of my resignation. I also will be awarded any RSUs that may be owed to me as compensation for my services through the date of my resignation.  In accordance with the terms of the Omnibus Equity Incentive Plan, all outstanding RSUs in Apollo will be vested and will convert to common stock within 90 days. Following my resignation, I will divest my interests in the Apollo Co- Investors X (A), L.P. investment fund for employees of Apollo. I will be entitled to certain benefits as a retired Director, including the right to invest in Apollo sponsored funds. For the duration of my appointment, I will forgo these benefits. (2021-03-01)

If confirmed by the Senate, I will resign from my position as a director and receive accrued director fees to that date. I also will be awarded any Share Equivalent Units that may be owed to me as compensation for Director services through the date of my resignation. Following my departure, all outstanding Share Equivalent Units will be vested per the company plan and will be settled within 90 days of my resignation. (2022-10-01)
Following my resignation as Director, I will receive accrued director fees for my services through the date of resignation. I will retain my vested LLC units in CFGI. (2024-01-01)

If confirmed by the Senate, I will resign from my position as an advisor to Electric Capital Partners LLC. Within 90 days of my resignation, I will divest my interest in Electric Capital Partners’ carried interest in Electric Capital Frontier Fund GP II LLC. (2022-10-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan.  The plan sponsor will not make further contributions after my separation from Sullivan & Cromwell LLP. (1995-10-01)
Sullivan & Cromwell LLP Group Defined Benefit Plan for Partners

I will continue to participate in this defined benefit plan under which I will be entitled to a retirement annuity at age 65.  The amount of this annuity was fixed when I resigned from Sullivan & Cromwell in April of 2017. Sullivan & Cromwell will not make any contributions to the Plan on my behalf for any additional benefits. (2017-04-01)

WMB Holdings, Inc. is the parent company of CSC, a global provider of business administration and compliance solutions, specialized administration services to alternative asset managers across a range of fund strategies, transactions involving capital markets participants in both public and private markets, domain name system management and digital brand and fraud protection, and corporate tax software solutions.
